runtime_policy: repo-only in-process fixture tests; does not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell, Python child processes, or visible windows
guard_policy: proves the castle overview baseline recheck rejects stale overview visual baselines, stale barracks controlled-stop baselines, and failing latest castle overview matrices, including matrices without visible/dormant target-done completion proof
tests: castle_overview_baseline_recheck passes with overview, barracks, and latest matrix inputs passing
castle_overview_baseline_recheck fails when the overview visual baseline fails
castle_overview_baseline_recheck fails when the barracks controlled-stop baseline fails
castle_overview_baseline_recheck fails when the latest castle overview matrix fails
castle_overview_baseline_recheck fails when latest matrix target-done completion proof is missing
castle_overview_baseline_recheck writes JSON and Markdown outputs
